settings.title: Model Settings
settings.target_hint: Changes which Vector DB is queried during chat.

chat.user_sample: Can you extract the main policies from the employee handbook related to working remote?
chat.ai_sample_heading: Certainly! Based on the **employee_handbook.pdf**, here are the primary guidelines for working remote:
chat.ai_sample_1: Ensure you have a stable internet connection of at least 25 Mbps.
chat.ai_sample_2: Maintain regular working hours as agreed upon with your manager.
chat.ai_sample_3: Use the company VPN for all internal resource access.
chat.ai_sample_4: Set your status to 'Available' on Slack during standard hours.
chat.ai_sample_5: Attend daily stand-ups and all mandatory sync meetings via Zoom.
chat.welcome_title: How can I assist you today?
chat.welcome_subtitle: Ask a question about your documents, or prompt a multimodal reasoning task.
chat.footer_disclaimer: AI can make mistakes. Verify critical information.

architecture.description: High-level overview of the Multimodal RAG system components and data flow.
